channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: The build cleanups in LU-1199 remove the "maximum" automake and autoconf version checks, and only have minimum versions.
Patch for automake-1.12 is at http://review.whamcloud.com/4479

It would be useful to fix these warnings, since they are distracting from any potential real problems that may appear. I don't see these on my local automake-1.11.1 version, and it seems strange to have significant behaviour differences in a minor update.

Looking more closely, the warnings are generated by autoconf-2.68, while I run autoconf-2.65 locally. So that is no reason to prevent the use of automake-1.12, but it would be nice to fix those autoconf warnings in a separate patch to avoid confusion for everyone.

OK, 1.11 output on fedora17

Checking for a complete tree...
/usr/bin/automake-1.11
checking for automake-1.11 >= 1.9... found 1.11.6
checking for autoconf >= 2.57... found 2.68
Running aclocal-1.11 -I /home/alexey/lustre-master/build/autoconf -I /home/alexey/lustre-master/libcfs/autoconf -I /home/alexey/lustre-master/lnet/autoconf -I /home/alexey/lustre-master/lustre/autoconf -I
/home/alexey/lustre-master/snmp/autoconfconfigure.ac:24: warning: AC_CONFIG_SUBDIRS: you should use literals
../../lib/autoconf/status.m4:1099: AC_CONFIG_SUBDIRS is expanded from...
/home/alexey/lustre-master/build/autoconf/lustre-build-ldiskfs.m4:31: LB_PATH_LDISKFS is expanded from...
/home/alexey/lustre-master/build/autoconf/lustre-build.m4:745: LB_CONFIGURE is expanded from...
configure.ac:24: the top level
configure.ac:24: warning: AC_CONFIG_SUBDIRS: you should use literals
../../lib/autoconf/status.m4:1099: AC_CONFIG_SUBDIRS is expanded from...

configure.ac:24: the top level

Running autogen for libsysio...
Running sh autogen.sh
Running autogen for lustre-iokit...
Running sh autogen.shRunning aclocal-1.11...
Running automake-1.11 -a -c...
Running autoconf...
Finished. Ready for ./configure ...

Running autogen for ldiskfs...
Running sh autogen.shChecking for a complete tree...
/usr/bin/automake-1.11
checking for automake-1.11 >= 1.9... found 1.11.6
checking for autoconf >= 2.57... found 2.68
Running aclocal-1.11 -I /home/alexey/lustre-master/ldiskfs/build/autoconf
Running autoheader
Running automake-1.11 -a -c -W no-portability
Running autoconf

I haven't seen any these warnings before, and I'm running automake 1.11.1 for a long time.

The AM_INIT_AUTOMAKE warning could likely easily be fixed. Same with AM_CPPFLAGS and AC_LANG_SOURCE. I'm not sure about the others, but since they all appear to relate to some of our macros, I guess they could be fixed in one location.

autogen's output:

Checking for a complete tree...
/opt/local/bin/automake-1.12
checking for automake-1.12 >= 1.9... found 1.12.4
checking for autoconf >= 2.57... found 2.69
Running aclocal-1.12 -I /work/lustre/lustre-release/build/autoconf -I /work/lustre/lustre-release/libcfs/autoconf -I /work/lustre/lustre-release/lnet/autoconf -I /work/lustre/lustre-release/lustre/autoconf -I /work/lustre/lustre-release/snmp/autoconfconfigure.ac:24: warning: AC_CONFIG_SUBDIRS: you should use literals
